articles.title: Bruins to open new season against the Rangers at TD Garden in matchup of Original Six franchises
articles.description:
The full NHL slate will be announced Thursday.

The post Bruins to open new season against the Rangers at TD Garden in matchup of Original Six franchises appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins will kick off the NHL season against the Rangers on October 12 at TD Garden.
This matchup features two Original Six franchises, enhancing local sports culture.
Fans can expect increased attendance and local business boosts during the season opener.

articles.title: 5 of the best hotel restaurants in America are in New England, according to OpenTable
articles.description:
They are in Massachusetts, Maine, and Connecticut.

Increased recognition may attract more tourists to Boston's hotel dining scene.

articles.title: Revolution’s Marko Mitrović reflected on World Cup memories
articles.description:
“I do remember my childhood, especially those summer times where we would just sit and watch the games the whole day."

summary: Marko Mitrović shares childhood World Cup memories, highlighting soccer's cultural significance.
Mitrović reflects on summer days spent watching games, connecting with local soccer fans.
His experiences resonate with Boston's diverse community, fostering a love for soccer.

articles.title: Joe Mazzulla showcased MMA training regimen, spoke about its influence on coaching the Celtics
articles.description:
"The pursuit of that helps with the pursuit of trying to make the Celtics great, so I'll do it as long as I can."

summary: Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla incorporates MMA training to enhance team performance.

Boston residents can expect a more competitive Celtics team due to innovative coaching methods.

articles.title: Report: Wrong-way driver who killed trooper had 9 drinks before Route 1 crash
articles.description:
Officials say toxicological testing showed the driver who crashed into Trooper Kevin Trainor’s cruiser had a blood alcohol level of 0.192, more than twice the legal limit.

The post Report: Wrong-way driver who killed trooper had 9 drinks before Route 1 crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wrong-way driver killed Trooper Kevin Trainor in a Route 1 crash.
Driver had a blood alcohol level of 0.192, over twice the legal limit.
Incident raises concerns about impaired driving and public safety in Boston.

articles.title: The best state to move to in 2026 is in New England — and it’s not Massachusetts
articles.description:
New Hampshire claimed the No. 1 spot, while Maine also landed in the top five in ConsumerAffairs' annual ranking of affordability, safety, and economic strength.

The post The best state to move to in 2026 is in New England — and it’s not Massachusetts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire ranked as the best state to move to in 2026.
Maine also placed in the top five for affordability and safety.
Boston residents may consider relocating to New Hampshire for better economic opportunities.
